calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Reserve And Statutory Compensation Withholding
Off Calendar Mar-09-2009 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-29-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James Johnson for and with Eberward Woerz (Executor and Petitioner).

The Court stated that the declaration received this morning cured just about everything and took the issue regarding the Executor's hourly rate under submission. Mr. Johnson explained that the estate was complicated and stated that he had to deal with hidden assests. Status on the reserve and the statutory compensation withholding was set for March 9, 2009.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: J. Alameda/ R.Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

Petition For Authority To Sell Remaining Securities And Other Estate Assets, For Pre-Approval Of Foreign Travel Expenses And For Partial Allowance On Account Of Statutory Executor And Attoney'S Compensation Fpr Odonary Servoces.
